parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ version: 3, chart: $json.chartConfig, width: 1100, height: 600, backgroundColor: 'white', format: 'png' }) }}

parameters.text:
You are an SEO and real estate analyst specializing in online demand data for the French residential new-build market.

Report date: {{ $now.format('DD/MM/YYYY') }}

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ STEP 1 вЂ” FETCH DATA в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Use each tool to read ALL rows BEFORE writing anything:
- Tool_demand_global в†’ demand_global (columns: date/month, volume)
- Tool_demand_transaction в†’ demand_transaction (columns: date, segment.transaction, volume)
- Tool_demand_asset в†’ demand_asset (columns: date, segment.asset, volume)
- Tool_ranking_global_war в†’ ranking_global_war (columns: date, url_hostname, rank_organic_war)
- Tool_audience в†’ audience (columns: date, type, clicks)

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ STEP 2 вЂ” WRITE ANALYSIS в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

## 1. demand_global вЂ” Market trend
- Current month volume vs M-1: absolute difference + %
- Current month vs same month last year (YoY): absolute difference + %
- 12-month trend: increasing or decreasing vs previous year?

## 2. demand_transaction вЂ” By segment
- Per segment: current month vs M-1 (number + %)
- Per segment: current month vs same month last year (number + %)
- Which segment is growing? Which is declining?

## 3. ranking_global_war вЂ” SEO competitive ranking
- List ALL unique url_hostname values found in the data вЂ” do not omit any competitor
- For each competitor: SeLoger Neuf current WAR rank vs their current rank
- Trend over last 12 months: improving or declining?

## 4. demand_asset вЂ” By asset type
- Current month volume vs M-1 per asset type: absolute + %
- Current month vs YoY per asset type
- Top growing and top declining asset type

## 5. audience вЂ” Brand vs Non-brand
- Current click split per type (%)
- Evolution vs previous period

рџЋЇ Rules: English only вЂ” bullets only вЂ” real numbers mandatory вЂ” no methodology.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ STEP 3 вЂ” GENERATE ADVANCED CHARTS в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

Produce exactly 5 Chart.js v3 configs. Use ONLY real numbers. QuickChart supports these extra plugins: chartjs-plugin-annotation AND chartjs-plugin-datalabels вЂ” USE THEM.

вљ пёЏ MANDATORY RULES FOR ALL 5 CHARTS:
- options.plugins.title = { display: true, text: "...", font: { size: 16, weight: "bold" }, padding: { bottom: 10 } }
- options.plugins.legend = { display: true, position: "bottom", labels: { padding: 16, font: { size: 12 } } }
- options.layout = { padding: { top: 10, right: 24, bottom: 10, left: 10 } }
- options.scales.x.grid = { display: false }
- options.scales.x.ticks = { font: { size: 11 } }
- options.scales.y.ticks = { font: { size: 11 } }
- All values MUST be real numbers. null only for genuinely missing rank data.
- NO placeholder text.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“Љ CHART 1 вЂ” demand_global вЂ” DUAL-LINE + ANNOTATION
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
type: "line"
Labels: last 13 month labels ("Apr 24" format)
Dataset 1 "Current year":
  borderColor "#4285F4", borderWidth 3, pointRadius 5, pointBackgroundColor "#4285F4"
  fill: false, backgroundColor: "rgba(66,133,244,0.08)", tension 0.35
Dataset 2 "Previous year":
  borderColor "#EA4335", borderWidth 2, borderDash [6,3], pointRadius 3, pointBackgroundColor "#EA4335"
  fill: false, tension 0.35
scales.y.title = { display: true, text: "Search Volume" }
scales.y.beginAtZero: false

ANNOTATION вЂ” add a horizontal line for the 12-month average of the CURRENT year:
options.plugins.annotation = {
  "annotations": {
    "avgLine": {
      "type": "line",
      "yMin": <computed 12-month average of current year as a number>,
      "yMax": <same value>,
      "borderColor": "rgba(66,133,244,0.5)",
      "borderWidth": 1,
      "borderDash": [4,4],
      "label": { "enabled": true, "content": "12M Avg: <value>", "position": "end", "backgroundColor": "rgba(66,133,244,0.1)", "color": "#4285F4", "font": { "size": 11 } }
    }
  }
}

Title text: "Global Search Demand вЂ” YoY: [+X% or -X%] | MoM: [+X% or -X%]"

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“Љ CHART 2 вЂ” demand_transaction вЂ” GROUPED BAR + DATALABELS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
type: "bar"
Labels: last 12 unique dates
One dataset per segment. Palette: ["#4285F4","#EA4335","#FBBC05","#34A853","#9C27B0","#FF6D00"]
stacked: false
scales.y.title = { display: true, text: "Search Volume" }

DATALABELS вЂ” show values on top of each bar:
options.plugins.datalabels = {
  "display": true,
  "anchor": "end",
  "align": "top",
  "font": { "size": 9, "weight": "bold" },
  "color": "#555"
}

Title: "Transaction Segments вЂ” Best: [segment name] | Declining: [segment name]"

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“Љ CHART 3 вЂ” ranking_global_war вЂ” MULTI-LINE + HIGHLIGHT SeLoger Neuf
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
type: "line"
Labels: last 12 unique dates
вљ пёЏ Create ONE dataset per EVERY unique url_hostname found in the data вЂ” include ALL competitors without exception.

For the dataset where label contains "selogerneuf" or "seloger-neuf" or is SeLoger Neuf's domain:
  borderWidth: 4, borderColor: "#4285F4", pointRadius: 6, pointBackgroundColor: "#4285F4", tension: 0.3, spanGaps: true, fill: false, order: 0

For all other competitor datasets (assign colors sequentially from this palette вЂ” it has enough for 15+ competitors):
  borderWidth: 2, borderColor: pick sequentially from ["#EA4335","#FBBC05","#34A853","#9C27B0","#FF6D00","#00ACC1","#795548","#F06292","#AED581","#FFD54F","#4DD0E1","#CE93D8","#FFAB40","#80CBC4","#EF9A9A"], pointRadius: 3, tension: 0.3, spanGaps: true, fill: false

scales.y.reverse: true
scales.y.title = { display: true, text: "WAR Rank (lower = better)" }
scales.y.ticks.stepSize: 1

ANNOTATION вЂ” horizontal line at rank 1 (the top position):
options.plugins.annotation = {
  "annotations": {
    "top": {
      "type": "line",
      "yMin": 1, "yMax": 1,
      "borderColor": "rgba(52,168,83,0.4)",
      "borderWidth": 1,
      "borderDash": [4,4],
      "label": { "enabled": true, "content": "Rank #1", "position": "start", "backgroundColor": "rgba(52,168,83,0.1)", "color": "#34A853", "font": { "size": 10 } }
    }
  }
}

Title: "SEO WAR Ranking вЂ” SeLoger Neuf: #[current rank] | [в†‘ Improving / в†“ Declining]"

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“Љ CHART 4 вЂ” demand_asset вЂ” STACKED BAR + TOTAL LINE + DATALABELS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
type: "bar" (mixed with a line dataset for the total)
Labels: last 12 unique dates

First, add one "bar" dataset per asset type (stacked). Palette: ["#4285F4","#EA4335","#FBBC05","#34A853","#9C27B0","#FF6D00"]
  For each: type: "bar", stack: "stack0"

Then add ONE extra dataset for the total per date:
  type: "line", label: "Total", data: [<sum of all asset volumes per date>]
  borderColor: "#212121", borderWidth: 2, pointRadius: 4, fill: false, tension: 0.3
  datalabels: { display: false }

scales.x.stacked: true
scales.y.stacked: true
scales.y.title = { display: true, text: "Search Volume" }

DATALABELS on bar datasets only (not the total line):
options.plugins.datalabels = {
  "display": "auto",
  "anchor": "center",
  "align": "center",
  "font": { "size": 9 },
  "color": "white"
}

Title: "Demand by Asset Type вЂ” Top: [asset] | Declining: [asset]"

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“Љ CHART 5 вЂ” audience вЂ” DOUGHNUT + DATALABELS PERCENTAGES
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
type: "doughnut"
Labels: distinct audience types from data (e.g. brand, nonbrand, anonymous)
data: total clicks per type вЂ” SUM over ALL rows
backgroundColor: ["#4285F4", "#34A853", "#FBBC05", "#9C27B0"] (use as many as needed)
borderColor: "white", borderWidth: 3
options.cutout: "60%"

DATALABELS вЂ” show percentage inside each slice. Compute total = sum of all data values. For each slice show: round(value / total * 100, 1) + "%" as a plain string number (NO function, compute the actual percentage values yourself using the real data):
options.plugins.datalabels = {
  "display": true,
  "font": { "size": 13, "weight": "bold" },
  "color": "white",
  "textAlign": "center"
}
вљ пёЏ The AI must NOT output any JavaScript function string for formatter. Instead, just omit formatter вЂ” QuickChart will display the raw value. Add a separate dataset label showing the percentage in the chart title.

Title: "Audience Split вЂ” Brand: [X%] | Non-brand: [Y%] | Anon: [Z%]"

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

рџЋЁ Color palette: #4285F4 #EA4335 #FBBC05 #34A853 #9C27B0 #FF6D00 #00ACC1 #795548

в›” STRICT JSON RULES for the [CHARTS_JSON] block:
- Output ONLY valid RFC 8259 JSON вЂ” no JavaScript, no comments (// or /* */), no trailing commas, no undefined, no single quotes
- Every property name MUST be in double quotes
- Every string value MUST be in double quotes
- Arrays and objects must be properly closed
- Do NOT truncate the JSON вЂ” output all 5 complete chart configs

Output вЂ” append at the very end of your response:

[CHARTS_JSON]
[
  { "sheetName": "demand_global",      "chartConfig": { ...complete Chart.js v3 config... } },
  { "sheetName": "demand_transaction", "chartConfig": { ...complete Chart.js v3 config... } },
  { "sheetName": "ranking_global_war", "chartConfig": { ...complete Chart.js v3 config... } },
  { "sheetName": "demand_asset",       "chartConfig": { ...complete Chart.js v3 config... } },
  { "sheetName": "audience",           "chartConfig": { ...complete Chart.js v3 config... } }
]
[/CHARTS_JSON]
